Project.NAME: grace-marketplace
Project.keywords: grace, methodology, skills-marketplace, cli, lint, knowledge-graph, contracts, verification
Project.annotation: Distribution package for the GRACE methodology: canonical skills, packaged mirror, Claude Code marketplace manifest, OpenPackage manifest, and the @osovv/grace-cli Bun-based CLI (grace lint, grace module, grace file, grace status).

M-CLI-ENTRY.NAME: CliEntry
M-CLI-ENTRY.purpose: Top-level CLI entry point; wires subcommands and handles Bun shebang execution.

M-CLI-LINT.NAME: CliLint
M-CLI-LINT.purpose: Implements `grace lint` — validates GRACE artifacts, semantic markup, unique tags, and skill-section discipline.

M-LINT-CORE.NAME: LintCore
M-LINT-CORE.purpose: Core linting engine: artifact presence, unique-tag XML, semantic markup, governed file checks, skill-section discipline.

fn-lintGraceProject.PURPOSE: Entry point returning LintResult for a project root

M-LINT-SKILL-SECTIONS.NAME: LintSkillSections
M-LINT-SKILL-SECTIONS.purpose: Warns when SKILL.md files miss the three required hardening sections (Common Rationalizations, When NOT to Use, Verification).

fn-lintSkillSections.PURPOSE: Return warning-level LintIssue[] for missing skill sections

M-LINT-ADAPTERS.NAME: LintAdapters
M-LINT-ADAPTERS.purpose: Language adapters for role-aware lint (TypeScript AST, Python regex).

export-getLanguageAdapter.PURPOSE: Resolve language adapter for a source path

fn-loadGraceLintConfig.PURPOSE: Load project config, emit schema-level issues if malformed

M-CLI-MODULE.NAME: CliModule
M-CLI-MODULE.purpose: Implements `grace module find` and `grace module show`.

M-CLI-FILE.NAME: CliFile
M-CLI-FILE.purpose: Implements `grace file show` — file-local MODULE_CONTRACT, MODULE_MAP, and semantic blocks.

export-fileCommand.PURPOSE: citty subcommand for file-local markup inspection

M-CLI-STATUS.NAME: CliStatus
M-CLI-STATUS.purpose: Implements `grace status` / `grace status --brief` — artifact health, module/verification counts, next action. Primary consumer: SessionStart hook injected by grace-init.

export-statusCommand.PURPOSE: citty subcommand for brief or full status

M-CLI-AFK.NAME: CliAfk
M-CLI-AFK.purpose: Implements `grace afk` — autonomous-harness subcommands (start/tick/ask/check/journal/defer/increment/report/stop). CLI enforces session time budget; agents cannot rationalize past it.

M-AFK-SESSION.NAME: AfkSession
M-AFK-SESSION.purpose: State store for /afk sessions under docs/afk-sessions//state.json; enforces expiresAt and exit codes (BUDGET_EXHAUSTED / NO_SESSION / SESSION_STOPPED).

fn-createSession.PURPOSE: Start a new session with hours + optional budget%

fn-checkActive.PURPOSE: Resolve active session or return expired/stopped/no-session

M-AFK-JOURNAL.NAME: AfkJournal
M-AFK-JOURNAL.purpose: Append-only writers for decisions.md and deferred.md inside each /afk session directory.

M-AFK-CONFIG.NAME: AfkConfig
M-AFK-CONFIG.purpose: Parse .grace-afk.json: Telegram credentials + autoStop caps. Not in git.

M-AFK-TELEGRAM.NAME: AfkTelegram
M-AFK-TELEGRAM.purpose: Minimal Telegram Bot API transport (sendMessage + getUpdates) with dependency-injected fetch for tests. No external dependencies.

fn-sendMessage.PURPOSE: POST to Telegram Bot API sendMessage, return messageId

M-STATUS-RUNTIME.NAME: StatusRuntime
M-STATUS-RUNTIME.purpose: Pure logic for status computation: artifact presence, counts, next-action heuristic, brief/full rendering.
M-STATUS-RUNTIME.annotations: <fn-renderBrief PURPOSE="Render BriefStatus as a <=30-line text snapshot" />

M-QUERY-CORE.NAME: QueryCore
M-QUERY-CORE.purpose: Loads and indexes GRACE artifacts (development plan, knowledge graph, verification plan, governed files) and exposes find/resolve helpers.

fn-loadGraceArtifactIndex.PURPOSE: Parse all GRACE XML docs and return a unified index

fn-resolveModule.PURPOSE: Resolve a module from id or path

fn-resolveGovernedFile.PURPOSE: Resolve a governed file from a path

M-QUERY-RENDER.NAME: QueryRender
M-QUERY-RENDER.purpose: Text formatters for module/file query results.

fn-formatModuleFindTable.PURPOSE: Render find results as a table

fn-formatModuleText.PURPOSE: Render a module record as text with optional verification excerpt

M-SKILLS-CANONICAL.NAME: SkillsCanonical
M-SKILLS-CANONICAL.purpose: Canonical source of truth for the shipped skills (including `grace-bootstrap`).

export-grace-init.PURPOSE: Bootstrap GRACE project structure; emits docs, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/settings.json

export-grace-bootstrap.PURPOSE: Meta-skill; enforces GRACE activation protocol at session start

export-grace-fix.PURPOSE: Debug with the Prove-It Pattern (failing test before fix)

export-grace-multiagent-execute.PURPOSE: Wave-based parallel execution with success thresholds

export-grace-plan.PURPOSE: Architectural planning with phases, checkpoints, dependency discipline

export-grace-ask.PURPOSE: Q&A with progressive disclosure (4-level context hierarchy)

M-SKILLS-PACKAGED.NAME: SkillsPackaged
M-SKILLS-PACKAGED.purpose: Packaged mirror of canonical skills under plugins/grace/ for Claude Code marketplace distribution.

export-mirror.PURPOSE: Exact copy of skills/grace/* kept in sync by scripts/validate-marketplace.ts

M-MARKETPLACE-MANIFEST.NAME: MarketplaceManifest
M-MARKETPLACE-MANIFEST.purpose: Claude Code marketplace manifest declaring the grace plugin and its 15 skills.

export-plugins.PURPOSE: Shipped plugin set and skill paths

M-VALIDATE-MARKETPLACE.NAME: ValidateMarketplace
M-VALIDATE-MARKETPLACE.purpose: Script that validates marketplace packaging: canonical/packaged sync, version consistency, structure, path safety.

export-main.PURPOSE: Run all validation checks and print the PASS/FAIL report
